civilian_1.name: Jack
civilian_1.story: I knew Ben since we where kids. We grew up in the same neighbourhood and kept in touch all these years.
civilian_1.alibi: Well I was very tired that night to be honest and I decided to sneak in one of the bedrooms and take a quick nap. Unfortunately I woke up and the police was here asking me about the murder.
civilian_1.pro_line: The money you get out of it are very good and it is a job with a lot of opportunities
civilian_1.w_line: Well I am not sure....There was a lot of noise that night. Nothing out of the ordinary

civilian_2.name: Joseph
civilian_2.story: Together with Ben we served in the military for two years. Since then we were good friends. He was a good man
civilian_2.alibi: Before the assassination happened I was in the staff room trying to clean my clothes. I was drinking some wine you see and I had a small accident.
civilian_2.pro_line: As a job it may not seem very compelling but I like it because I get to help a lot of people
civilian_2.w_line: There was this lady that was looking at her phone the whole night. It looked like she was waiting for a phone-call or something.

civilian_3.name: Mathew
civilian_3.story: I got the chance to get to know him a bit but besides that we didn't speak much
civilian_3.alibi: To be honest I was in the kitchen in my phone texting some friends. When I heard the gunshot I ran towards the living room to check with the others what happened
civilian_3.pro_line: Sometimes it becomes one of the most interesting professions and other times it is just ok
civilian_3.w_line: There was this guy called Mark who claimed to be Ben's friend from high school. I didn't really like him.

civilian_4.name: Thomas
civilian_4.story: I got the chance to get to know him a bit but besides that we didn't speak much
civilian_4.alibi: Before the assassination happened I was in the staff room trying to clean my clothes. I was drinking some wine you see and I had a small accident.
civilian_4.pro_line: Sometimes it becomes one of the most interesting professions and other times it is just ok
civilian_4.w_line: I guess the only suspicious thing that I saw was these two guys out of the house but they were part of the security

mafioso_1.name: Nancy
mafioso_1.story: I work in an advertising company and your uncle wanted help to promote a store or something similar.
mafioso_1.alibi: I remember going out to take my jacket. While I was out I think I saw someone jumping out of the window, a woman maybe, but it was dark so I may be wrong
mafioso_1.pro_line: Although it might be quite boring at times its an interesting and fun job
mafioso_1.w_line: It might be my imagination but I think I saw someone with dark hair heading upstairs about 10 minutes before the murder

mafioso_2.name: Mark
mafioso_2.story: Well, I met him about ten years ago when he first came to the neighborhood. Good guy and very polite with all
mafioso_2.alibi: That night I was hanging out near the fireplace with some other guest. We were talking about the upcoming elections
mafioso_2.pro_line: Sometimes it becomes one of the most interesting professions and other times it is just ok
mafioso_2.w_line: I think I heard this woman called Veronica talk about an important event taking place the day after the party. I am not sure if that helps you.

detective.name: Oscar
detective.story: With Ben we worked on the same company for several years. Then he came one day and said that he decided to take a risk and start a business of his own
detective.alibi: Before the assassination I was outside the house, having a phone-call with my daughter.
detective.pro_line: Although it might be quite boring at times its an interesting and fun job. You get to meet plenty of people.
detective.w_line: Well if I was to decide about it, the old sheff should be the prime suspect not us. That person seemed very nervous the hole time.

doctor.name: Nancy
doctor.story: I knew Ben since we where kids. We grew up in the same neighbourhood and kept in touch all these years.
doctor.alibi: Before the assassination I was outside the house, having a phone-call with my daughter.
doctor.pro_line: As a doctor you work a lot and sometimes you don't really get enough credit for your work
doctor.w_line: To be honest with you, there was a lot of noise and people all over the place that night. Nothing out of the ordinary
